name: KiCad Design Diary
description: Automatically tracks every change made to a PCB design in plain English. Zero setup, zero Git required. Every save is recorded as a human-readable changelog with a built-in timeline panel and exportable report.
description_full: KiCad Design Diary silently snapshots your entire PCB design on every save, compares it to the previous state, and generates a plain English description of exactly what changed. No Git. No manual effort. No setup. A native timeline panel shows your complete design history and a one-click export generates a professional HTML report.
